build_system: pip + AWS CDK CLI (npx cdk). Must use NODE_OPTIONS="" prefix for all node/cdk commands due to sandbox environment.
test_framework: pytest with aws_cdk.assertions. Tests in tests/unit/. Shared fixtures in tests/conftest.py (app and template fixtures).
verification_instructions: 1. Run NODE_OPTIONS="" pytest tests/ - all tests must pass. 2. Run NODE_OPTIONS="" npx cdk synth - must succeed cleanly.
setup_instructions: pyenv local 3.11.15 && pip install -r requirements.txt -r requirements-dev.txt
environment_constraints: Must use NODE_OPTIONS="" prefix for any node/npm/cdk commands. Python 3.11.15 via pyenv. COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode (can install packages).
contribution_requirements: TDD-first: write failing tests before implementation. Conventional commit messages (feat:, fix:, etc). All infrastructure in CDK, no manual changes. Update ARCHITECTURE.md after changes. Least-privilege IAM.
key_patterns: CDK stack in cdk_base/cdk_base_stack.py. Tests use template fixture from conftest.py. Tests verify CloudFormation template properties using aws_cdk.assertions (Template.has_resource_properties, find_resources, resource_count_is). State machine definition is inspected as JSON string. Lambda code in lambda/sleep_audio_processor/handler.py.
directory_structure: cdk_base/ - CDK stack definitions. lambda/sleep_audio_processor/ - Lambda handler code. tests/unit/ - pytest unit tests. .github/workflows/ci.yml - CI pipeline.
